text: The truffle pasta was incredible and the service was warm and attentive. Will be back!
Great steak frites, but we waited a while for the bill at the end of the night.
Cozy atmosphere and the burrata caprese was fresh and delicious.
Food was good but nobody offered us dessert and the table felt rushed.
Best lamb ragu in Dubai. Excellent portion size and value.
Salmon was overcooked and slow service during dinner rush.
Lovely evening, the espresso martini was a nice touch to end the meal.
Truffle arancini is a must order. Staff were friendly and attentive.
Solid Italian food, wish they mentioned dessert options before clearing plates.
Table turnover felt slow, waited 15 minutes just to order.
Wonderful date night spot, the pasta and wine pairing was perfect.
Good food overall, Caesar salad was fresh and generous.
